title: ADR 0001 re-implemented — workspace resets to pre-A/B snapshot between runs
content: IMPORTANT operational fact: memory recorded ADR 0001 (placements funnel conversion) as delivered, but on this run the registered codebase was checked out at commit 'eval: pre-A/B snapshot' with NONE of the prior files on disk (no src/features/placements/lib/, no docs/adr/, no test script). The persona's working copy does not persist file edits across runs — each invocation may start from the same baseline snapshot. Therefore: always VERIFY actual codebase state before assuming prior work exists, and be ready to re-apply a recorded design. Re-implemented computeFunnelConversion() in src/features/placements/lib/conversion.ts (stepPct/overallPct, all via one safePct() clamped to [0,100]), wired into FunnelCard, added 6-case node:test suite + npm test script + tsconfig allowImportingTsExtensions. Verified: 6/6 tests pass, tsc clean. Live funnel = 2.4% sourced→hired. Design unchanged from prior ADR; the record was correct, only the disk state was reset.

IMPORTANT update: prior open low-3 (safePct numerator guard) is effectively RESOLVED — the existing result-level `if (!Number.isFinite(pct)) return 0;` at conversion.ts:47 covers non-finite numerators, so do NOT re-flag it. Two low notes still open/deferred: (1) FunnelCard opacity '1-index*0.12' unbounded for >=9 stages (safe at 6 stages today); (2) package.json test glob needs engines.node>=21 to avoid false-green zero-test runs.

content: Re-scan of Apprenticeship Placement deduped against the baseline. Result: 0 fixed, 3 still OPEN. M1 [dependency] postcss XSS GHSA-qx2v-qp2m-jg93 — STILL OPEN. IMPORTANT nuance: top-level postcss was bumped to ^8.5.15 in devDependencies (partial-fix attempt) but next still bundles a transitive postcss <8.5.10, so npm audit (2 moderate) still flags it — recommend root `overrides: { postcss: '>=8.5.10' }`. M2 [pii] src/features/placements/data.ts STILL OPEN — line numbers confirmed: clean MVR L28, DUI 2017 L30, MVR review L44; ALSO candidates[] L58-67 carry mvr fields + 'Returning citizen' badge L63 (criminal-justice status). L1 [dependency] @google/generative-ai ^0.24.1 (package.json:11) STILL unused in src + deprecated. New ADR-0001 code (lib/conversion.ts + test, currently git-untracked) is pure/guarded — NO new security findings. Did NOT re-open the M1/M2/L1 triage decision (already pending from prior run).

CONVENTION: this project increments MINOR for breaking changes while under 0.x; first 1.0.0 will be the threshold where breaking becomes MAJOR. Previous release decision memory from prior session confirmed and completed.
